job_title: Technology Analyst Program - Data Engineer (Berkeley Heights, NJ)
strengths: Strong SQL and relational DB skills
Proven quantified impact (efficiency and revenue gains)
CI/CD and data quality tooling experience
weaknesses: Early-career (0-3 years) limiting deep production tenure
improvement_bullets: Developed and managed automated data workflows using Python and scheduling tools, creating scalable pipeline orchestration to ensure data consistency across multiple environments.
Integrated diverse data sources into a centralized repository, applying best practices for distributed computing frameworks and big data processing concepts similar to Spark and Hadoop.
Engineered robust data pipelines within cloud environments, utilizing cloud-native data factory patterns for ingestion and transformation tasks.
Implemented CI/CD best practices and version control workflows to automate testing and deployment of data models, ensuring high availability and reliability for enterprise-scale analytics.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Technology Analyst Program - Data Engineer (Berkeley Heights, NJ) opportunity with Fiserv, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ+ business community. I am interested in this opportunity because of Fiserv’s position as a global leader in Fintech and its commitment to developing emerging talent through a structured, performance-driven analyst program. What interests me about working for Fiserv is its approach to innovating the way the world moves money and information; this inspires me because I am passionate about building the reliable, scalable infrastructure that powers global finance. I believe my expertise in architecting data pipelines and my ability to solve complex technical challenges would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data integrity and process automation. In fact, while architecting an ELT pipeline for economic forecasting, I utilized Python and SQL to transition raw API data into a dbt star schema, automating validation with Great Expectations and deploying via a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. This resulted in a production-ready system that optimized query performance and significantly reduced load times. Ultimately, I know that the Technology Analyst Program - Data Engineer role at Fiserv would allow me to bring my data engineering proficiency to support your analytics and operational platforms. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my cloud-based data modeling skills. I translated complex business requirements into high-performing Power BI workflows and statistical models, which identified key customer segments and contributed to a 300% revenue increase over 12 months. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and cloud-based data warehousing in working on scalable data ingestion and transformation at Fiserv. I know that my technical problem-solving skills and my experience with the end-to-end data lifecycle align with what it takes to succeed in the Technology Analyst Program. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
